package rulefixtures

// scenario for clear_map_go121: `for k := range m { delete(m, k) }` in Go 1.21+ codebases
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule470NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario470Negative(records []Rule470NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
